prompt: A futuristic plasma blast, with glowing blue and purple energy spheres surrounded by particle emissions.
prompt_refined: Generate a vivid, high-resolution depiction of a futuristic plasma blast. It prominently features multiple intensely glowing energy spheres, colored in brilliant electric blue and deep neon purple, clustered centrally. These spheres are encircled by a chaotic yet mesmerizing cloud of radiating, fine particle emissions, creating dynamic streaks of light and shimmering dust, all emanating outwards from the core.
